rulings.Case Title: ANGELICA M. GONZALEZ VS. ALFONSO PICAZO, AS TRUSTEES OF THE ARTHUR AND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Instruct Partition Referee To Execute Indemnity Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 29, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF ANGELICA GONZALEZ's Motion To Instruct Partition Referee To Execute Indemnity Agreement. Plaintiff's Motion to Instruct Partition Referee to Execute Indemnity Agreement. Defendants' opposition is being considered by the Court to the extent it covers the same arguments as arguments raised in Defendants' opposition to Plaintiff's ex-parte application of July 9, 2013. Hearing is continued to August 13, 2013. Further briefing is required re: the amount of potential EPA liability; whether sales proceeds are sufficient to cover such liability; whether Plaintiff and Defendants are personally liable for any excess over the proceeds amounts; whether moving party has sufficient funds to cover/ contribute to any excess liability. Plaintiff's brief (not to exceed 10 pages, excluding declarations) shall be filed and personally served no later than August 2, 2013 by 4:00 p.m. Defendants' response (not to exceed 10 pages, excluding declarations) shall be filed and personally served no later than August 8, 2013 by 4 p.m. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELICA M. GONZALEZ VS. ALFONSO PICAZO, AS TRUSTEES OF THE ARTHUR AND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 29, 2013, line 1 - OTHER JAMES CANTRELL's Motion To Confirm Sale Of Real Property. Partition Referee's Motion to Confirm Sale of Property. Hearing Required to address who prepared documents filed by referee in support of Motion to Confirm Sale. If the Court is satisfied that Referee's papers were properly prepared the tentative ruling is: Partition Referee's Motion to Confirm Sale of Property is GRANTED as follows: Referee may proceed with the sale, provided buyer withdraws it's request for Defendants' indemnification, and/or as soon as the indemnification issue is resolved by mutual written agreement of the parties or by this Court. All the proceeds of the sale shall be kept in escrow until EPA liability issue is resolved. No disbursements except for sales commission of 5% shall be made. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Sanctions Against Pltff For Violation Of A Court Order To Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 29, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT ADAM WHITE's Motion For Sanctions Against Plaintiff For Violation Of A Court Order To Produce Documents. Defendant White's Motion for Sanctions for Violation of Order to Produce Documents is GRANTED as follows. Plaintiff shall provide further responses to Request for Documents Number 6 indicating that all responsive documents have been produced ("not will produce") with verification within 5 days from the Notice of Entry of Order. Plaintiff shall not be allowed to use any documents other than documents produced in discovery in support of their claim for quiet title to show chain of title. =(501/HD)
